stories.name: Neutral
stories.snippet:
const Neutral = () => <ActionBanner
    title="Sin partida"
    detail="Crea o unete a una sala."
    severity="neutral"
    mode="waiting" />;

stories.name: Your Turn
stories.snippet: const YourTurn = () => <ActionBanner title="Tu turno" detail="Lanza el dado." severity="your-turn" mode="roll" />;

stories.name: Blocked
stories.snippet:
const Blocked = () => <ActionBanner
    title="Esperando turno"
    detail="Turno de jugador 1."

    mode="waiting" />;

stories.name: Danger
stories.snippet:
const Danger = () => <ActionBanner
    title="Orca pendiente"
    detail="Debes destruir una carta propia para continuar."
    severity="danger"
    mode="orca" />;

stories.name: Success
stories.snippet:
const Success = () => <ActionBanner
    title="Accion completada"
    detail="Termina tu turno para continuar."
    severity="success"
    mode="done" />;
